meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Overcome basic app limitations with the Antigravity project template. A high-speed guide for freelancers using Claude Code to ship professional SaaS faster.
content.answer_block: Stop reinventing the wheel with boilerplate code. The Antigravity project template provides a production-ready foundation, automating authentication, database schemas, and API routing. By integrating Claude Code, you can scaffold entire modules in seconds, allowing you to focus on high-value client features instead of repetitive setup tasks.
content.intro:
You’ve been here: staring at a blank IDE, knowing the architecture you need, but dreading the hours of configuration required to get the first button to click. The gap between a junior developer’s 'basic app' and a professional SaaS is usually just a lack of robust, reusable infrastructure.

Today, we bridge that gap. By leveraging the Antigravity template, you gain a battle-tested foundation that handles the heavy lifting of modern web architecture, leaving you free to focus on the unique business logic that actually pays the bills.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Clone the base template to establish a standardized directory structure and pre-configured environment variables.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity SaaS template with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Schema with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to interpret your business requirements and generate the corresponding database schema within the Antigravity structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a subscription-based task manager including Users, Projects, and Subscriptions tables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on user-task-subscription requirements'

steps.title: Configure Secure Auth Middleware
steps.description: Implement role-based access control by leveraging the template's built-in authentication hooks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up protected routes for the dashboard and admin panel using the Antigravity auth middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement middleware auth guards for /dashboard and /admin routes'

steps.title: Build API Endpoints via Template Helpers
steps.description: Use the Antigravity helper functions to generate CRUD endpoints rapidly without manual boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a REST API endpoint for fetching project data with pagination and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold api routes using antigravity helper library for project management'

steps.title: Deploy to Production Infrastructure
steps.description: Finalize the configuration for seamless deployment to Vercel or your preferred cloud provider.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Prepare deployment configuration for Vercel, ensuring all environment variables are mapped correctly.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'verify production build configuration and export deployment script'

pro_tips: Always use 'context-aware' prompts in Claude Code by appending your documentation files as references.
Keep your Antigravity template in a private GitHub repo to create a personal 'starter-pack' that evolves with every project.
Use the template's built-in testing suite to run automated regression checks immediately after every Claude Code update.
Map your custom business logic to the 'hooks' directory in Antigravity to keep your core codebase clean and upgradeable.
Leverage Claude Code's 'diff' mode to review changes before committing, ensuring the AI hasn't hallucinated outside your project's architectural constraints.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, audit your code for repetitive patterns and create your own custom sub-templates to further reduce development time for future clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start shipping like a senior architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
